title: Created Date Field for Salesforce Objects
description:
Add a created-date field to the SQL database to log when a Salesforce object is first added to the scorecard. This date is not immediately user-facing but supports future requirements:

1. **Scope creep tracking** — When working with clients, the created date highlights when new objects were added to the project scope over time.
2. **Event logging** — Supports a future event logging feature on the product roadmap.
acceptance_criteria: A created_date column exists in the SQL database for Salesforce objects
The created_date is automatically populated when a new Salesforce object is added to the scorecard
Existing rows are backfilled with a reasonable default date or null
The field is available in PHP code for downstream use
middleware_changes: PHP code updated to populate the created_date field when inserting new Salesforce objects into the database.
data_model_changes: New created_date column added to the Salesforce objects table in the SQL database. Stores the timestamp when an object is first added to the scorecard.
implementation_notes: The created date field is foundational infrastructure for future features: scope creep tracking for client engagements and the event logging roadmap item.
